sub_pixel_system.notes: Flight simulation; sub-pixel system not documented

special_mechanics.name: Flight Dynamics
special_mechanics.description: Realistic aerodynamics and flight principles including altitude control, pitch/roll/yaw mechanics, thrust management, and stall physics based on speed and angle of attack

physics_values.note: Documentation mentions flight dynamics algorithms inherited from C64 version but specific values not disclosed

special_mechanics.name: Radar Signature System
special_mechanics.description: Player's varying radar signature visually compared with incoming radar pulses at different ranges and powers, affecting detectability

tier_notes: F-19 Stealth Fighter is an air combat flight simulator. Tier 2 classification: qualitative documentation only. Wikipedia source confirms realistic flight dynamics and aerodynamics systems but does not provide specific numerical physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values). Game manual reportedly includes aerodynamics tutorials but manual content not available in provided source. Player movement parameters are not applicable to this flight simulation genre.
